name: mentor-connect
description: A comprehensive mentorship platform connecting mentors and mentees with real-time communication, appointment management, and rating system
author: Your Name

scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.clean: npm run clean:frontend && npm run clean:backend && rm -rf node_modules
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.format: npm run format:frontend && npm run format:backend
scripts.demo:setup: npm run install:all && cd backend && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push && npm run db:seed
